questions.question: What is the difference between a mutable and immutable object in Python?
Give an example of a mutable object in Python.
keyPoints: A list is a mutable object

questions.question: Give an example of an immutable object in Python.
keyPoints: A tuple is an immutable object

questions.question: What happens when you try to modify an immutable object in Python?
Why are immutable objects useful in Python?
keyPoints: They can be safely shared between different parts of a program

questions.question: Explain the difference between mutable and immutable objects in Python.
keyPoints: Examples of mutable and immutable objects

questions.question: Discuss the advantages and disadvantages of using mutable and immutable objects in Python.
Explain how to make a mutable object immutable in Python.
keyPoints: Converting a mutable object to an immutable type
